## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature  
- [ ] Refactor / improvement

## Alembic migration?

- [ ] No migration

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend changes)
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (backend changes)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
